creator: beat@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 15.08.2010 13:22, Hardy Schumacher wrote:
> I've updated Firefox-3.6 to the latest version (=> v3.6.8) and the issue is still available.
> Further I updated the whole system to latest patch level 7.3-p2, removed all ports first, cleaned directories, and installed all ports again. But the issue has not been fixed.
> Btw, Firefox-3.6 does not support https connections.

Could you please check if /usr/lib/libc_r.so is installed on your
system? If yes, please run "make check-old" in /usr/src to list all
obsolete but still installed files on your system. Please consider to
remove them and rebuild Firefox.

Beat
